name: Kalona-City Park
description: Kalona-City Park is a place to play pickleball in Wellman, IA. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Kalona YMCA Rec Center
description: Kalona YMCA Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kalona, IA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Washington YMCA
description: Washington YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Washington, IA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include lights.
